# PolySui by Suize — call Bitcoin up or down

> A live BTC up/down game on Sui. Pick a side for the next 15-minute round,
> one tap, done. Sign in with Google — no wallet setup, no gas. Runs on Sui
> testnet with play money.

How it plays:

- Every round asks one question: will BTC be UP or DOWN in 15 minutes? A
  winning contract redeems for $1, a loser for $0.
- One tap places the bet against a shared vault; you can cash a live position
  out at its live price any time before expiry.
- Onboarding: Google sign-in (keys never leave your machine) with every
  transaction gasless — or connect your own Sui wallet.
- Be the House: supply the vault and earn the house side of every bet;
  redeem your share anytime.

For agents: PolySui is a human game — there is no agent betting API. If you are
an agent looking to pay or get paid on Sui, read the Suize rail contract:
https://suize.io/llms.txt

## Links

- Play: https://polysui.suize.io
- Suize home: https://suize.io
- The rail (agent contract): https://suize.io/llms.txt
- This file: https://polysui.suize.io/llms.txt
